description: F56 create+delete block rule lifecycle (Sprint 41 F97, authored 2026-06-13). Creates a Top-Level-Domain block rule for TLD 'xyz' (IANA-registered), confirms the save dialog, then uses the Manage Rules search box to locate and delete the created rule in a teardown testCase -- net DB change is zero. Accepted TLD input format confirmed from DomainValidation.validateTld (domain_validation.dart:66-84): bare TLD without leading dot (e.g. 'xyz', 'cc') OR with leading dot (e.g. '.xyz') -- ManualRulePatternGenerator.generateTopLevelDomain strips a leading dot before validating. TLD must be in kIanaTlds Set (iana_tlds.dart). 'museum' and '.museum' were rejected in the S40 port because 'museum' is NOT in kIanaTlds (validateTld line 81: 'TLD not a registered IANA TLD'); '.museum' strips to 'museum' and hits the same error. 'xyz' IS in kIanaTlds. Generated pattern: @.*\.xyz$ , source_domain: *.xyz. Selectors verified against selector map _SELECTOR_MAP_2026-06-05.md. STATUS: authored, pending sweep verification.

testCases.title: Create TLD block rule for xyz
Delete the xyz block rule (teardown -- restores DB state)
